title: The Power Shift Among the Gods
bodyText:
> [!dm] The cosmic background hum: Lathander caged in the pool; Ms. Judy's old patron **Myrkul** displaced — S14 prep names **Kelemvor** as what's "taken his place"; Gond talkative decades ago, silent now; the pool older than all of them. Kena is slated to exposit this. Barely written — huge design space.
>
> **⏸ Alaric / the pretender-demigod wearing Lathander's light → PARKED TO CHAPTER 2 (grill 2026-07-09).** See [[children-of-lathandar]]. Keep the rest of the god-shift hum as Ch-1 background.

Update: Kena told the party pieces of this (S15, pool lore + Eilistraee). The recurring prep note "**Mirror mechanic — Dhampir patron — won't work on Eddy/Varen because they are claimed by another**" confirms both are already spoken for by higher powers.
